Class-Druid 20 — Male Human Druid: 20
Strength: 10 (+0) Dexterity: 12 (+1) Constitution: 16 (+3) Intelligence: 10 (+0) Wisdom: 15 (+2) Charisma: 14 (+2)
Background: Acolyte Alignment: Neutral Deity: Greek-Tyche (N)
Ability Boosts: Constitution Experience: 494361/1000000 Level: 20 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 150/300
Ability Notes:
Human Ability Adjustment: +1 Charisma/+1 Constitution/+1 Dexterity/+1 Intelligence/+1 Strength/+1 Wisdom
Tavern Brawler: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Constitution, Strength)
Ability Boosts: 1 to distribute
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +6
Feat Count: General: 5 Selectable Feature Count: Druid (Druid Circle)
Feats: Elemental Adept (Cold); Elemental Adept (Thunder); Magic Initiate (Wizard); Mounted Combatant; Tavern Brawler Human Features: Human Ability Adjustment; Language (Common; Choose 1 from any) Druid Features: Archdruid; Armor Proficiency (Light; Medium; Shield); Beast Spells; Blazing Revival; Cantrip Versatility; Cauterizing Flames; Circle Of Spores Spells; Circle Of Spores; Circle Of Stars; Circle Of Wildfire Spells; Circle Of Wildfire; Cosmic Omen; Druid Circle; Druidic; Enhanced Bond; Full Of Stars; Fungal Body; Fungal Infestation; Halo Of Spores; Save Proficiency (Intelligence; Wisdom); Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from Arcana, Animal Handling, Insight, Medicine, Nature, Perception, Religion, Survival); Spellcasting (Druid); Spreading Spores; Star Map; Starry Form; Summon Wildfire Spirit; Symbiotic Entity; Timeless Body (Druid); Tool Proficiency (Herbalism Kit); Twinkling Constellations; Weapon Proficiency (Club; Dagger; Dart; Javelin; Mace; Quarterstaff; Scimitar; Sickle; Sling; Spear); Wild Companion; Wild Shape Acolyte Features: Language (Choose 2 from any); Shelter Of The Faithful; Skill Proficiency (Insight; Religion)
Feature Notes:
Druid Circle: 1 selection
Shelter Of The Faithful: Can receive aid from temples of Greek-Tyche and fellow believers
Timeless Body (Druid): Ages at 1/10 normal rate
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +1 Insight: (wis) +8 Performance: (cha) +2
Animal Handling: (wis) +2 Intimidation: (cha) +2 Persuasion: (cha) +2
Arcana: (int) +0 Investigation: (int) +0 Religion: (int) +6
Athletics: (str) +0 Medicine: (wis) +8 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +1
Deception: (cha) +2 Nature: (int) +0 Stealth: (dex) +1
History: (int) +0 Perception: (wis) +2 Survival: (wis) +8
Skill Proficiency: Insight; Medicine; Religion; Survival
Tool Proficiency: Herbalism Kit
Languages: Common; Draconic; Elvish; Halfling
Skill Notes: Druidic: Speaks a secret language known only by druids
Combat
Hit Points: 140 Initiative: +1 Armor Class: 15
Armor Proficiency: Light; Medium; Shield Weapon Proficiency: Club; Dagger; Dart; Improvised Weapons; Javelin; Mace; Quarterstaff; Scimitar; Sickle; Sling; Spear
Armor: Breastplate Shield: None Weapons: Scimitar (+7 1d6+1 S); Sling (+7 1d4+1 B R30/120); Unarmed Strike (+6 1d4 B); Unarmed
Combat Notes:
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +60
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +1
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +1
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +1
Tavern Brawler: Weapon Proficiency (Improvised Weapons)/Unarmed Strike inflicts 1d4 HP
Cosmic Omen: R30' Depending on the roll of a die after a long rest, can use a reaction either to increase or to decrease an attack, ability, or save roll by 1d6 6 times before the next long rest
Fungal Body: Has immunity to critical hits
Halo Of Spores: R10' Can use a reaction to inflict 1d10 HP necrotic on a target (save DC 16 Constitution negates)
Mounted Combatant: Has advantage on melee attacks on unmounted foes smaller than mount and can redirect attacks on mount to self
Spreading Spores: While Symbiotic Entity is active, can use a bonus action to move the Halo Of Spores effects to a 10' cube 30' away for 1 min
Symbiotic Entity: Can expend 1 Wild Shape use to gain 80 temporary hit points, double the Halo Of Spores damage, and inflict +1d6 HP necrotic with melee hits for 10 min; losing all the temporary hit points or using Wild Shape ends
Tavern Brawler: Can use a bonus action to grapple after a successful unarmed strike or improvised weapon attack
Save Proficiency: Intelligence; Wisdom
Save: Charisma: +2; Constitution: +3; Dexterity: +1; Intelligence: +6; Strength: +0; Wisdom: +8
Save Notes:
Full Of Stars: Starry Form gives resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing
Fungal Body: Has immunity to the blinded, deafened, frightened, and poisoned conditions
Mounted Combatant: Mount's successful Dexterity saves yield no damage instead of half, and failed saves yield half damage
Magic
Spells Known/Prepared: D0: 4; D: 22; W0: 2; W: 1 Spell Slots: D1: 4; D2: 3; D3: 3; D4: 3; D5: 3; D6: 2; D7: 2; D8: 1; D9: 1 Attack: D: +8; W: +6 Spell DC: D: 16; W: 14
Spells:
Animal Friendship (D1 Ench): (Action) R30' Convinces target beast that self is harmless (save Wisdom negates; Intelligence 4 or higher immune) for 24 hr or until harmed (+Level affects +1 target)
Animate Dead (D3 [Circle Of Spores Spells] Necr): (Minute) R10' Bones or the corpse of a Medium or Small humanoid becomes a skeleton or zombie that obeys commands when within 60' for 24 hr (+Level animates +2 undead)
Aura Of Life (D4 [Circle Of Wildfire Spells] Abju): (Action) 30' radius gives nonhostile creatures resistance to necrotic damage and immunity to maximum hit point reduction, and raises those with 0 hit points to 1 hit point, for concentration up to 10 min
Awaken (D5 Tran): (8 Hours) Touched beast or plant gains Intelligence 10, speech, and movement and becomes charmed for 30 days or until harmed
Beast Sense (D2 Divi): (Action) Self can perceive through a touched willing beast's senses for concentration up to 1 hr [R]
Blight (D4 [Circle Of Spores Spells] Necr): (Action) R30' Kills a nonmagical plant or inflicts 8d8 HP necrotic on a creature (save Constitution half; plant target has disadvantage on the save and suffers maximum damage on failure) (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Blindness/Deafness (D2 [Circle Of Spores Spells] Necr): (Action) R30' Inflicts a choice of blindness or deafness (save Constitution negates; additional saves each rd end) for 1 min (+Level affects +1 target)
Burning Hands (D1 [Circle Of Wildfire Spells] Evoc): (Action) 15' cone inflicts 3d6 HP fire (save Dexterity half) and lights unattended flammable objects (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Chill Touch (D0 [Circle Of Spores Spells] Necr): (Action) R120' Ranged spell inflicts 4d8 HP necrotic, and the target cannot regain hit points until the start of the next turn; undead also suffer disadvantage vs. self attack for 1 rd
Chill Touch (W0 Necr): (Action) R120' Ranged spell inflicts 4d8 HP necrotic, and the target cannot regain hit points until the start of the next turn; undead also suffer disadvantage vs. self attack for 1 rd
Cloudkill (D5 [Circle Of Spores Spells] Conj): (Action) R120' 20' radius becomes heavily obscured, inflicts 5d8 HP poison (save Constitution half), and moves away 10' at the start of each turn for concentration up to 10 min (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Confusion (D4 [Circle Of Spores Spells] Ench): (Action) R90' Creatures in a 10' radius lose reactions and randomly: 10% wander; 50% do nothing; 20% attack an adjacent creature; 20% act normally (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level increases the radius by 5')
Conjure Animals (D3 Conj): (Action) R60' Summons a choice of 1, 2, 4, or 8 obedient CR 2, 1, 1/2, or 1/4 fey spirits in beast form for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level doubles, triples, or quadruples the number of animals at level 5, 7, or 9)
Conjure Fey (D6 Conj): (Minute) R90' Summons an obedient CR 6 fey for 1 hr; loss of concentration makes it hostile (+Level increases the CR by 1)
Conjure Minor Elementals (D4 Conj): (Minute) R90' Summons a choice of 1, 2, 4, or 8 obedient CR 2, 1, 1/2, or 1/4 elementals for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level doubles or triples the number of elementals at level 6 or 8)
Contagion (D5 [Circle Of Spores Spells] Necr): (Action) Touch inflicts poisoned (save Constitution each turn; 3 successes end, and 3 failures inflict a choice of disease for 7 days)
Cure Wounds (D1 [Circle Of Wildfire Spells] Evoc): (Action) Touched regains 1d8+2 hit points (+Level restores +1d8 hit points)
Darkvision (D2 Tran): (Action) Willing touched sees 60' in darkness for 8 hr
Feign Death (D3 Necr): (Action) Touched appears dead and gains resistance to non-psychic damage for 1 hr [R]
Find Familiar (D1 [Wild Companion] Conj): (Hour) R10' Self gains the service of a summoned spirit in animal form that allows telepathic communication, remote sensing, and use of its reaction to deliver remote touch attacks when within 100' [R]
Fire Shield (D4 [Circle Of Wildfire Spells] Evoc): (Action) Self emits a 10' bright light and gains resistance to a choice of heat or cold, and successful adjacent attackers suffer 2d8 HP fire or cold, for 10 min
Fire Storm (D7 Evoc): (Action) R150' 10 contiguous 10' cubes inflict 7d10 HP fire (save Dexterity half) and ignite unattended flammable objects
Flame Strike (D5 [Circle Of Wildfire Spells] Evoc): (Action) R60' 10' radius inflicts 4d6 HP fire and 4d6 HP radiant (save Dexterity half) (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP of a choice of fire or radiant)
Flaming Sphere (D2 [Circle Of Wildfire Spells] Conj): (Action) R60' 5' sphere emits a 20' bright light, inflicts 2d6 HP fire (save Dexterity half) on creatures within 5', and ignites unattended flammable objects for concentration up to 1 min; can use a bonus action each rd to move it 30', rolling over 5' barriers and jumping 10' gaps (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Friends (W0 Ench): (Action) Self gains advantage on Charisma checks with a non-hostile target for concentration up to 1 min; the target becomes hostile afterward
Gaseous Form (D3 [Circle Of Spores Spells] Tran): (Action) Touched willing creature becomes gaseous, gaining a 10' fly Speed, resistance to nonmagical damage, and advantage on Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution saves, for concentration up to 1 hr
Gentle Repose (D2 [Circle Of Spores Spells] Necr): (Action) Touched corpse becomes immune to decay and animation for 10 days [R]
Greater Restoration (D5 Abju): (Action) Touched recovers from an effect causing an exhaustion level, a charmed or petrified condition, a curse, an ability reduction, or a reduction of hit point maximum
Guidance (D0 Divi): (Action) Willing touched gains +1d4 on 1 ability check within concentration up to 1 min
Guidance (D0 [Star Map] Divi): (Action) Willing touched gains +1d4 on 1 ability check within concentration up to 1 min
Guiding Bolt (D1 [Star Map] Evoc): (Action) R120' Ranged spell inflicts 4d6 HP radiant and gives advantage on the next attack on the target before the end of the next turn (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Gust Of Wind (D2 Evoc): (Action) 60'x10' wind pushes 15' (save Strength negates), inflicts half movement, disperses gas and vapor, and extinguishes flames (50% chance for protected flames) for concentration up to 1 min; can use a bonus action each turn to redirect the wind
Healing Word (D1 Evoc): (Bonus) R60' Target regains 1d4+2 hit points (+Level restores +1d4 hit points)
Jump (D1 Tran): (Action) Touched gains triple jump distance for 1 min
Mass Cure Wounds (D5 [Circle Of Wildfire Spells] Evoc): (Action) R60' 6 targets in a 30' radius regain 3d8+2 HP (+Level restores +1d8 HP)
Plant Growth (D3 [Circle Of Wildfire Spells] Tran): (Action) R150' Causes plants in a 100' radius to overgrow, slowing movement to 1/4 Speed, or enriches a half-mile radius for 1 year
Poison Spray (D0 Conj): (Action) R10' Inflicts 4d12 HP poison (save Constitution negates)
Polymorph (D4 Tran): (Action) R60' Transforms the target creature into a beast (save Wisdom negates; shapechangers automatically succeed) for concentration up to 1 hr or until reduced to 0 hit points
Produce Flame (D0 Conj): (Action) Emits bright light in a 10' radius for 10 min; allows a R30' ranged spell attack that inflicts 4d8 HP fire and ends the spell
Protection From Energy (D3 Abju): (Action) Touched gains resistance to a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder for concentration up to 1 hr
Ray Of Sickness (W1 Necr): (Action) R60' Ranged spell inflicts 2d8 HP poison and poisoned for 1 rd (save Constitution HP only) (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Reverse Gravity (D7 Tran): (Action) R100' Items in a 50' radius, 100' high cylinder fall upward for concentration up to 1 min
Revivify (D3 [Circle Of Wildfire Spells] Necr): (Action) Restores life and 1 hit point to a touched 1-min-old corpse
Scorching Ray (D2 [Circle Of Wildfire Spells] Evoc): (Action) R120' 3 ranged attacks each inflict 2d6 HP fire (+Level gives +1 ranged attack)
Shapechange (D9 Tran): (Action) Allows self to polymorph repeatedly into familiar living creatures of equal or lesser CR, gaining the hit points and hit dice of that creature, for concentration up to 1 hr or until reduced to 0 hit points
Shillelagh (D0 Tran): (Bonus) Held club gains +8 magical attacks that inflict 1d8+2 HP for 1 min
Sunburst (D8 Evoc): (Action) R150' 60' radius inflicts 12d6 HP radiant and blindness for 1 min (save Constitution half HP only; additional saves each rd end)
Thunderwave (D1 Evoc): (Action) 15' cube inflicts 2d8 HP thunder and pushes 10' (save Constitution half HP only) (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Wall Of Fire (D4 Evoc): (Action) R120' Creates a 60'x20'x1' wall or a 20'x20'x1' ring that inflicts 5d8 HP fire (save Dexterity half) within 10' of a chosen side for concentration up to 1 min (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Wall Of Stone (D5 Evoc): (Action) R120' Creates 10 contiguous 10'x10'x6" or 10'x20'x3" stone panels (save Dexterity allows using a reaction to avoid entrapment), with Armor Class 15 and 30 hit points each, for concentration up to 10 min; concentrating for 10 min makes the wall permanent
Wall Of Thorns (D6 Conj): (Action) R120' Creates a 60'x10'x5' wall or a 20'x20'x5' ring that inflicts 7d8 HP piercing (save Dexterity half) initially, plus 1/4 Speed and 7d8 HP slashing to creatures passing through (save Dexterity half) for concentration up to 10 min (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Magic Notes:
Archdruid: Has increased Wild Shape effects
Twinkling Constellations: Has increased Starry Form effects
Archdruid: Casting spells requires no verbal, somatic, or cost-free material components
Beast Spells: Can cast spells requiring no material components during Wild Shape
Blazing Revival: R120' Can extinguish the Wildfire Spirit to regain 70 hit points and stand when reduced to 0 hit points once per long rest
Cantrip Versatility: Can replace a cantrip when boosting an ability or taking a feat
Cauterizing Flames: R30' Can create a spectral flame for 1 min where a creature dies and later use it to heal 2d10+2 hit points or to inflict 2d10+2 HP fire on another in the same space 6 times per long rest
Elemental Adept (Cold): Spells that inflict cold damage ignore resistance and treat 1s as 2s on damage dice
Elemental Adept (Thunder): Spells that inflict thunder damage ignore resistance and treat 1s as 2s on damage dice
Enhanced Bond: When the Wildfire Spirit is present, spells can be cast through it, fire spells inflict +1d8 HP fire, and healing spells restore +1d8 hit points
Fungal Infestation: R10' Can use a reaction to animate a creature upon death into an obedient zombie with 1 hit point for 1 hr 2 times per long rest
Magic Initiate (Wizard): Knows 2 Wizard cantrips and can cast a chosen W1 spell without expending a spell slot once per long rest
Spellcasting (Druid): Can cast spells from the druid spell list and cast spells marked with [R] using a ritual; regains expended spell slots after a long rest
Star Map: Can cast Guiding Bolt without expending a spell slot 6 times per long rest
Starry Form: Can use a bonus action and expend a Wild Shape use to emit a 10' bright light for 10 min, gaining the benefits of the archer constellation (can use a bonus action to make a R60' spell attack that inflicts 2d8+2 HP radiant), the chalice constellation (self healing spells restore 2d8+2 to another creature within 30'), or the dragon constellation (gain a 20' fly Speed and score a minimum of 10 on concentration rolls)
Summon Wildfire Spirit: R30' Can expend a Wild Shape use to inflict 2d6 HP fire in a 10' radius (save DC 16 Dexterity negates) and summon an obedient Wildfire Spirit (Armor Class 13; 105 hit points; move or fly 30'; R60' +8 attack inflicts 1d6+6 HP fire; can teleport willing targets in a 5' radius 15', inflicting 1d6+6 on those left behind (save DC 16 Dexterity negates)) for 1 hr
Twinkling Constellations: Can switch between Starry Forms at the start of a turn
Wild Companion: Can expend a Wild Shape use to cast Find Familiar, summoning a fey spirit for 10 hr
Wild Shape: Can transform into a CR 1 creature for 10 hr unlimited times per short rest
Notes
Validation Errors: Selectable Feature Allocation: 1 available vs. 3 allocated
